official_status_source_name: Northside Suburban Little League official Facebook page
future_status_protocol: If Northside Suburban publishes a live field-status page, RainOutline line, or explicit cancellation feed, enable polling only after parser tests prove open/closed/cancelled wording is visible.
agent_rule: Official source wins. The official social page is useful for announcements but is not a stable live field-status feed, so keep official status unknown unless a clear official cancellation/closure post is found. Tell the user to check the official source before leaving.
